sections.title: 1. N+1 Query Patterns
2. Unnecessary Re-renders
3. Caching Opportunities
4. Memory Leaks
5. Redundant Computations
Priority Order
sections.content:
| # | Issue | Impact | Effort |
|---|-------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Serial container creation in `provisionUserPod` | High — 4× latency for pod setup | 1 line |
| 2 | `AnalyticsAPI` no `destroy()` / leak on WS | High — unbounded growth in long sessions | Small |
| 3 | `exportApi` DOM leak on exception | Medium — leaks `<a>` in error paths | 1 line |
| 4 | Read-modify-write in `updatePhysics` etc. | Medium — doubles network cost per settings save | Small |
| 5 | `typeMap`/`names` array per call | Low-medium — affects hot paths in test/transform code | Trivial |
| 6 | Missing per-endpoint caches | Low — avoids redundant fetches in settings panels | Small |
| 7 | `deepMergeVisual` with empty object | Low — wasted iteration on cold start | Trivial |

codeBlocks.code:
// CURRENT
const key = path.split('.')[2];   // new array every call

// CURRENT — always merges even when server provides nothing
glow: deepMergeVisual(DEFAULT_GLOW_SETTINGS, v.glow || {}),

// FIX — short-circuit when stored is empty
glow: v.glow && Object.keys(v.glow).length > 0
  ? deepMergeVisual(DEFAULT_GLOW_SETTINGS, v.glow)
  : { ...DEFAULT_GLOW_SETTINGS },

// CURRENT
const url = `/list${searchParams.toString() ? `?${searchParams}` : ''}`;
